text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I invite Tazuna to go see a movie since I happen
to have a discount coupon for the theater.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I arrive at the theater to find Tazuna overjoyed.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Did you know the movie theater just underwent a
large-scale renovation?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: The sound system got major improvements! It seems they were handing out coupons to celebrate the grand reopening.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The gigantic screen and booming sound are the
best parts of going to the movies, don't you
think?
choice_data_list: You really like movies, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I sure do! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, we haven't decided on which
movie to see yet!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any specific genre preferences, so
anything would be great!
choice_data_list: Let's see Bad Housewife: The Twenty Billion Yen Woman.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh right, that spy movie! Yeah, that sounds
exciting!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
There's something kind of appealing about
leading a secret double life like that. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
...Oh my. Sorry, but do you mind if I go buy a
towel?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Well... You see...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm definitely going to cry during this one! A
handkerchief won't be enough!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...And so Tazuna and I enjoy a movie together.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, that was so fun! Thanks so much for inviting
me today!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I've been so busy lately that I haven't been able
to go to the movies, so I was really happy to step
back into the world of cinema today! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I do! The movies themselves are great, of course,
but I—how should I put this? I really love movie
theaters!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
With smartphones and the internet, it's easy to
watch movies anywhere, but...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Riding the train, walking to the theater, picking
out your seat, watching the trailers, and waiting
for the main feature...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I can't get enough of that feeling of anticipation!
It's like waiting for the starting gates to open! ♪
choice_data_list: ...How do you know what that feels like?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Uh, what I mean is...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh! This is our stop!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, this is where we must part! Be careful on the
way home!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Tazuna leaves, I look up at the digital
billboard in front of the station.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"She made her mark, but then left the racing
world forever... Yet her legend has endured
through the ages..."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "The Phantom Umamusume, returning soon to a theater near you!"
